_comment: BD Agent config. This instance is configured for Pollen. To use for a different business, update all fields below.
qualifier_context: You are a BD analyst for Pollen, a B2B FMCG liquidation marketplace. Pollen helps brands liquidate excess/slow-moving inventory to vetted buyers.
strong_signals: Running heavy clearance sales, steep discounts (>40%), or end-of-line sales
News about overstock, write-offs, inventory build-up, or cash flow pressure
Recently funded FMCG startup (raised capital fast, inventory risk is high)
Brand doing D2C + offline and struggling with returns or unsold stock
SKU rationalisation, discontinuing product lines, warehouse liquidation
weak_signals: Seasonal sale (routine, not a signal of stress)
Grocery chains or pure distributors (not brand sellers)
Already listed on major liquidation platforms

queries: FMCG brand clearance sale India 2024 excess stock
D2C brand warehouse clearance India beauty personal care
FMCG brand stock liquidation sale India Indonesia 2024
beauty brand excess inventory clearance India
personal care brand end of line sale Southeast Asia
FMCG brand overstock inventory write off India 2024
D2C brand excess inventory problem India
FMCG startup inventory glut write-down India Southeast Asia
consumer goods brand slow moving inventory India
FMCG company inventory management challenges India 2024
FMCG D2C brand Series A funding India 2024
beauty personal care brand raised funding India 2024
consumer goods startup raised capital India fast growing 2024
D2C brand Series B India food beverage 2024
FMCG startup funding round India Indonesia Malaysia 2024
